title: RedBed Client
description: a client modpack that packs alot of best client mods for best performance and more tweaked gameplay!
body:
![Logo Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29e98e71ceb4f992495ba3f32c0104e2ef44c645.png)

![Upper Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7d22571f4b9e101d6febca28e47dd9028cdc47f_0.webp)

![Up to date title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcc44414e94540014217ddf66cd8af8e48fb4dcb_0.webp)

# **About:**

This is a client modpack that contains a lot of mods that makes game beautiful and gives more performance, and some tweaks that make the gameplay easier and smoother.

### Such as:
- Smoother Animations
- Gameplay tweaks
- Bugs Fix
- More Abilities
- More Sound FXs
- More Advanced HUDs - GUIs
- More Customizeable Contents for Video Settings and Gameplay!




# How to Use?

This is a very simple modpack, you just need to import the .mrpack into your launcher.

Remember to view some of the options like video settings, because maybe some the options that sets inside this modpack, it's not your taste!

# Usable Features!

### Keybinds
- You can sort your inventory where you point your mouse while you press the key "Mouse Middle Button"
- To change your perspecitve you need to press key "V"
- Sneak and sprint keys Swiped, Sprint Is "Left Shift" and Sneak is "Left Ctrl"
- Want a more qualified screenshot? the key "F9" takes screenshots about 4K resolution *(old not in 1.21.5 pack)*
- Auto Clicker inside game! you don't need anymore to use F3 + T for your farms to use auto click, you can now auto click with the key [I] on your keyboard, first you need to config the auto clicker with key [O]
- The Hotbar it doesn't loop anymore, if you want to disable it for looping hotbar, you need to press [-], Close to the "0" key. *(old, not in 1.21.5 pack)*

### Features!
- Now you can install Resource packs or datapack and worlds easier inside the game! There is a button shaped cross, you can update your packs with the button Next to the cross button too! (Resourcify Mod)
- Now you can bridge easier without looking on block and sneaking! (Bridging Mod)
- You can zoom and zoom out spyglass with mouse scroll! (Spyglass Improvments)
- chunks can have animations, if you want to set your own chunk animation loading, you can go inside Video Settings -  Chunk fading, every possible option for chunks loading and animating them is there!
- Playing java with controller? Of course, no problem you can connect your controller to your pc, and you can set up your controller inside "Controls... - Controller Settings", Before, be sure you have already installed it's drivers, if it's not, it's possbile the game dosen't recognise your controller.
